name: doodleworks-mcp
description: Personal MCP App: hand-drawn technical slide decks rendered inline in an MCP host, bring-your-own image API key.

scripts.build: pnpm run check:tinku && tsc --noEmit && tsc -p tsconfig.server.json && cross-env INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build
scripts.start: concurrently --raw "cross-env NODE_ENV=development INPUT=mcp-app.html vite build --watch" "tsx watch main.ts"
